response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including geospatial data processing with his GISCollective project. However, his primary expertise lies in TypeScript, JavaScript, and Node.js, with minimal direct experience in modern C++ or Rust, which are critical for this role. His recent roles have been focused on full-stack development and AI-agent infrastructure rather than routing tiling or navigation systems.
strengths: Strong background in geospatial data processing with GISCollective, demonstrating relevant domain knowledge.
Experience with distributed systems and high-performance applications (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby).
Proven ability to work across full technical stacks and adopt new technologies.
concerns: Limited direct experience with modern C++ or Rust, which are primary technologies for this role.
No clear evidence of working with routing data pipelines or navigation systems.
Most recent roles focus on AI-agent infrastructure and full-stack development rather than routing tiling or geospatial optimization.
